title: Venue
doc_html:
Art. 1546.  Venue

A proceeding brought pursuant to this Chapter may be commenced in the parish in which the minor resides or the marriage ceremony is to be performed.

Acts 1991, No. 235, §15, eff. Jan. 1, 1992.
